title: Doggy Dilemmas
description: A Java Modification that adds domesticated dog breeds in-to the game
body:
**Doggy Dilemmas**

Ever wished that you could have more puparoos in Minecraft?
Who does not?!
![Doggy Dilemmas - Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4e7080f00d6b58c9ab54bf7d715055868fc5d60_0.webp)
Well the Doggy Dilemmas Mod is here to scratch that itch, adding a palethera of lovable pooches who share the likeness of your best furry friends with every breed coming in a variety of coat colourations.
These adorable doggos can sit, follow and wander around. Set them on the attack against your foes or other equally adorable creatures, (you monster).
Equip them with fashionable cosmetics and customize your dogs to reflect your furry friends!
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
![Huskies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74101a5aedb64dd1aa7775dd32f81312ba2f0f40_0.webp)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
This Modification adds new dog breeds gradually with each update and more cosmetics will be added as-well. Version 1.0 of this Modification adds Huskies and Dog Collars that come in all Sixteen of Minecraft's colours.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Update Version 1.0.1 Introduces Beagles and a few tweakes and bug fixes to previously-incorporated features.
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
![Beagles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/451b383624e18ede7f371bde3b67fa8517cc8d30_0.webp)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Update Version 1.0.2 Introduces Labradors and as well as a few bug fixes to previously-incorporated features.
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
![Labradors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96f54d754dcd26ac6679781a9df155d54d427cc9_0.webp)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Update Version 1.0.3 Introduces Border Collies
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
![Border Collies Added in Release Version 1.0.3 of Doggy Dilemmas for Minecraft Version 1.20.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b35777914bf0fda5965ae22b0becf104c1fd423e_0.webp)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Update Version 1.0.4 Introduces Standard Schnauzers (Medium Schnauzer Breed)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
![Standard Schnauzer (Medium Schnauzer Breed)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d29e81e1751b08d8c90f13949226da3b27c0b8b7_0.webp)
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Update Version 1.0.5 Introduces French BullDogs
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
![French BullDogs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23187124b0d860fb152b89589fed6ad5f6c0f34f_0.webp)
